Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a specific item for her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}Isn't that the prize you can win in a raffle? You enter by buying packs of Gummy Gum.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}Why would you want one? You're already in high school...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}I-I'm not into it or anything! I just happen to have extra raffle tickets.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I actually have a dupe of the same color, so you can have it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, wow... I didn't know you liked Phoenix Ranger Featherman R.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}M-Maybe we could watch it together sometime...?[n]{f 1 1}
